scripts.build: cd journal && npx tree-sitter generate && cd ../timeclock && npx tree-sitter generate && cd ../timedot && npx tree-sitter generate && cd ../csv && npx tree-sitter generate
scripts.codegen: node src/extract-tests.js && cd journal && npx tree-sitter test --update && cd ../timeclock && npx tree-sitter test --update && cd ../timedot && npx tree-sitter test --update && cd ../csv && npx tree-sitter test --update
scripts.test: cd journal && npx tree-sitter test && cd ../timeclock && npx tree-sitter test && cd ../timedot && npx tree-sitter test && cd ../csv && npx tree-sitter test
